title: 建议信基础结构
template: 给出两至三条具体建议
sentences: I am writing to offer a few practical suggestions.
It would be helpful to consider...

title: 图画作文基础结构
sentences: The drawing highlights a phenomenon that deserves attention.

smallWriting.prompt:
Read the following email from your friend Paul and write him a reply.

Dear Li Ming,
I was really moved by the Chinese families' handwritten letters you posted yesterday. They are priceless! Could you please tell me a bit more about them? And are they currently on public display somewhere? I'm very keen to see them in person. Thanks.
Yours,
Paul

You should write about 100 words on the ANSWER SHEET. Do not use your own name in the email; use "Li Ming" instead.
writingIdeas: 回应 Paul 对手写家书的兴趣
介绍这些家书的历史意义和展出情况
提醒参观注意事项或表达陪同意愿
structure: 开头回应来信并说明写作目的
主体介绍家书背景、保存与展出信息
commonMistakes: 没有回应对方两个问题
smallWriting.sampleEssay:
Dear Paul,

I'm writing to provide more information about the handwritten letters from Chinese families and answer your questions.

These letters are historically significant as they document ordinary people's lives during wartime China in the 1930s-1940s. They have been carefully preserved by the museum for decades and were recently organized into this special exhibition. The collection is currently on public display at the National Museum of Modern History in Hall 3. Each letter has been professionally restored to ensure its preservation. The exhibition requires visitors to follow specific guidelines regarding photography and distance to protect the fragile documents.

I'm delighted by your interest and would be happy to accompany you for a visit.

Best regards,
Li Ming

bigWriting.prompt:
Write an essay based on the charts below. In your essay you should:
1) describe the drawing briefly,
2) interpret the charts, and
3) give your comments.

Write your answer in 160-200 words on the ANSWER SHEET.

图表主题：一项关于养老机器人的消费者接受度和首要关注点调查。饼图显示：完全接受 39.3%，部分接受 32.8%，不接受 27.9%。柱状图显示首要关注点：安全 46.3%，价格 24.9%，便利 10.7%。
bigWriting.topic: 养老机器人消费者接受度与关注点
writingIdeas: 描述消费者接受度分布
解释安全、价格、便利等主要顾虑
提出提升养老机器人接受度的建议
structure: 第二段分析数据背后的原因
第三段总结并提出建议
commonMistakes: 只描述数据但没有解释原因
bigWriting.sampleEssay:
The charts clearly illustrate consumers' attitudes toward elderly care robots and their key concerns when considering such products. First, full acceptance dominates as the most popular choice, selected by 39.3% of respondents. Second, this is closely followed by partial acceptance, chosen by 32.8% of respondents. Finally, non-acceptance represents a smaller but still significant proportion at 27.9%.

There are several concerns and corresponding evidence behind the data. First of all, it should not be ignored that safety is a critical factor for consumers, as reflected by the highest bar at 46.3%. This is because it is self-evident that users prioritize the well-being and physical security of the elderly. In addition, what also matters is that price plays a key role in adoption decisions, with 24.9% citing it as a primary concern. For example, high costs may limit accessibility for ordinary families, which provides evidence to support this point. Lastly, it is obvious that convenience is closely linked to consumer preference, though it ranks lower at 10.7%, indicating that practicality remains a consideration.

In summary, while acceptance of elderly care robots is divided, addressing safety and affordability could significantly enhance their market appeal and social integration.

tasks.prompt:
Read the following email from a student. Write a reply.

Dear Li Ming,
I have got a class assignment to make an oral report on an ancient Chinese scientist. I am not sure how to prepare for it. Could you give me some advice? Thanks for your help.
Yours,
Paul

Write your letter in no less than 100 words. Do not sign your own name at the end of the letter. Use Li Ming instead.
tasks.structure: 开头回应求助并说明写信目的；主体建议选择科学家、查找可靠资料、整理报告提纲；结尾表达祝愿并欢迎继续联系。
expressions: I am writing to offer you some practical suggestions.
It is advisable to organize your findings into a clear outline.
Feel free to contact me if you have any further questions.
tasks.deductions: 容易扣分点：没有回应对方求助；建议太空泛；格式缺少称呼或落款；字数不足。

tasks.prompt: 2024 年英语一大作文题目数据待补充。当前 PDF 文本页未完整显示大作文图画内容，暂不乱编真实图画。

smallWriting.prompt: Write a notice to recruit a student for Professor Smith's research project regarding sports activities on campus. Include the job duties, required qualities and contact information. Use Li Ming as the signature.
writingIdeas: 说明招募目的和项目背景
介绍主要工作：收集数据、观察运动活动、记录学生表现
说明能力要求：观察力、沟通能力、责任心、相关经验优先
structure: 第二段列出任务和要求
结尾给出联系方式和署名
usefulExpressions: The basic information is as follows.
commonMistakes: 通知格式缺标题或日期

bigWriting.prompt: Write an essay based on a picture about a dragon boat race becoming livelier and livelier in a village. The picture suggests the inheritance and revitalization of traditional Chinese culture.
writingIdeas: 描述龙舟赛越来越热闹的画面
解释传统文化受到年轻人和社会重视的原因
评论传承传统文化应取其精华并注入新活力
structure: 第二段分析传统文化传承的原因
第三段总结并提出个人观点
commonMistakes: 只描述图画没有升华主题
传统文化表达过于空泛

smallWriting.prompt: Write an email to Professor Smith to invite him to organize a team for the international innovation contest to be held by your university. Include basic information about the contest and use Li Ming as the signature.
writingIdeas: 说明写信目的：邀请 Smith 教授组织团队参赛
介绍比赛主题、时间、地点和展示形式
表达期待回复并提供联系方式
usefulExpressions: I am writing to invite you to...
Your participation is of great importance...
commonMistakes: 邀请对象和比赛信息不清

bigWriting.prompt: Write an essay based on a picture showing two students' different attitudes toward campus lectures: one thinks the lecture is irrelevant to the major and useless, while the other believes something useful can be learned by attending it.
writingIdeas: 描述两名学生对校园讲座的不同态度
分析广泛学习能拓宽视野、完善知识结构
提出在变化社会中保持求知欲的重要性
structure: 第一段描述图画和差异态度
第二段分析广泛学习的意义
commonMistakes: 只写专业学习，忽略广泛学习主题

notes: 2021 writing template only; content awaits manual entry.

smallWriting.prompt: Reply to your friend William and provide information about the Aiding Rural Primary Schools project, including its activities and volunteer requirements. Sign as Li Ming.
writingIdeas: Explain the purpose of the project.
Describe volunteer activities in rural primary schools.
State the qualities expected of volunteers.

bigWriting.prompt: Write an essay based on a cartoon showing two people climbing a mountain. One wants to stop because he is tired, while the other offers water and encourages him to rest and continue. The caption is On the Way.
bigWriting.topic: Persistence and adjustment on the way to a goal
writingIdeas: Describe the two climbers.
Explain the value of persistence and adjusting one's pace.
Give your own comment.

smallWriting.prompt: Write an email on behalf of the Students Union to invite all international experts on campus to attend the graduation ceremony. Include the time, place and relevant details. Sign as Li Ming.
writingIdeas: Issue the invitation.
Give the time, place and ceremony details.
Express hope that the experts will attend.

bigWriting.prompt: Write an essay based on a cartoon about a college student choosing between an easy elective and a difficult but innovative elective.
writingIdeas: Describe the student's dilemma.
Explain why challenging and innovative courses matter.
Give your own recommendation.

notes: Image-only PDF; OCR or a text PDF is required.
